title: They Found a *HUGE* UFO Buried Underground!
summary: This interview discusses discoveries at Skinwalker Ranch, where investigators found a large metallic object approximately 400 feet wide buried underneath the mesa. The team drilled into the mesa and recovered metal shards containing rare earth elements europium and tellurium, suggesting manufactured rather than natural origin.

key_claims.claim: A large metallic object approximately 400 feet wide is buried underneath the mesa at Skinwalker Ranch
Metal shards collected from drilling contained europium and tellurium, rare earth elements
A metallurgist determined the samples were fused metal that was likely manufactured rather than naturally occurring
A large boulder blocked the snake camera from getting a visual of the buried object
